title-group.article-title: Cognitive outcomes in a prospective cohort

abstract.p: This prospective cohort assessed cognitive outcomes over twelve weeks in 240 adults.

sec.title: Introduction
sec.p: Background context for the study question and prior literature.

sec.title: Methods
sec.p: Participants were enrolled consecutively and assessed with a validated instrument MARKER_METHODS.

sec.title: Results
sec.p: The primary outcome improved with an odds ratio of 1.8 MARKER_RESULTS.

sec.title: Discussion
sec.p: Findings should be interpreted with caution given confounding MARKER_DISCUSSION.

sec.title: Limitations
sec.p: The single-center design limits generalisability MARKER_LIMITATIONS.

sec.title: Conflicts of interest
sec.p: The authors declare no competing interests MARKER_CONFLICTS.

element-citation.article-title: An unrelated reference about discussion and methods MARKER_BIBLIO
